error_signature: HaloPSA not listed in credentials field
title: HaloPSA credentials not available in HTTP Request node
symptom: The HTTP Request node does not list HaloPSA in the credentials dropdown, preventing authentication setup.
not_this_if: HaloPSA is available in the credentials dropdown for other nodes
root_cause: The HTTP Request node does not have a predefined credential type for HaloPSA. Instead, users must utilize the Generic Credential Type to authenticate with HaloPSA.
fix_steps: Open the HTTP Request node settings
Select 'Generic Credential Type' instead of 'Predefined Credential Type'
Choose the appropriate authentication option that matches your HaloPSA setup
agent_instruction: Use the Generic Credential Type in the HTTP Request node to authenticate with HaloPSA.
